title: fatty crunchy croatian shungiku papillote
description: a rich and satisfying macrobiotic-friendly dish from croatia, featuring shungiku and a crunchy raclette-grill crust.
instructions: preheat the raclette-grill to medium heat.
trim the shungiku leaves and cut them into bite-sized pieces.
in a blender or food processor, combine the ricotta salata cheese, almond flour, and a pinch of salt and pepper, blending until smooth.
with a spatula, mix the shungiku into the cheese mixture until well combined.
brush the raclette-grill with olive oil and sprinkle with sea salt and black pepper.
pour the shungiku-cheese mixture onto the raclette-grill and spread it evenly.
drizzle the lemon juice over the top and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
place the raclette-grill under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
remove the raclette-grill from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
